task.title: Adopt ruffen docs in ty mdtests

rating.rationale: Agent completed the task fully autonomously with zero CEO interventions. The solution is well-structured across 4 files with a clean separation of concerns — adding a lookup method, wiring it into the formatter with proper fallback, and including a focused test. Communication is excellent: clear problem statement, precise diffs, and a 'why this matters' section. Docking one point on satisfaction/code_quality only because the output describes the solution rather than showing a merged PR or verifiable artifact — it reads as a plan rather than confirmed-shipped work.
